queries.name: Noisy Neighbor Detection with Tenant Context
queries.pain_point: Multi-tenant performance isolation challenges - noisy neighbor problems require manual log analysis to identify
queries.query:
FROM api_requests
| WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 1 hour
| STATS p95_latency = PERCENTILE(response_time_ms, 95), request_volume = COUNT(*) BY tenant_id
| LOOKUP JOIN tenants ON tenant_id
| INLINESTATS avg_p95 = AVG(p95_latency), avg_volume = AVG(request_volume)
| EVAL latency_vs_avg_pct = ((p95_latency - avg_p95) / avg_p95) * 100
| EVAL volume_vs_avg_pct = ((request_volume - avg_volume) / avg_volume) * 100
| EVAL noisy_neighbor_score = (latency_vs_avg_pct * 0.4) + (volume_vs_avg_pct * 0.6)
| EVAL sla_breach = CASE(p95_latency > tenants.sla_target_p95_ms, true, false)
| WHERE noisy_neighbor_score > 50 OR sla_breach == true
| EVAL revenue_impact = tenants.contract_arr / 12 / 30
| SORT noisy_neighbor_score DESC
| KEEP tenant_id, tenants.tenant_name, tenants.account_tier, p95_latency, tenants.sla_target_p95_ms, noisy_neighbor_score, sla_breach, revenue_impact
| LIMIT 20
queries.description: Identifies tenants consuming disproportionate resources by comparing their P95 latency and request volume against the average, calculating a noisy neighbor score, and flagging SLA breaches with revenue impact

queries.name: At-Risk Customer Early Warning System
queries.pain_point: No early warning system for customer health - at-risk accounts identified only 30-60 days before renewal, costing $8-12M annually in preventable churn
queries.query:
FROM feature_usage_events
| WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 30 days
| STATS feature_dau = COUNT_DISTINCT(user_id), feature_events = COUNT(*) BY tenant_id
| LOOKUP JOIN tenants ON tenant_id
| EVAL days_to_renewal = DATE_DIFF("day", NOW(), tenants.renewal_date)
| EVAL usage_trend_score = CASE(
    feature_dau < 5, 20,
    feature_dau < 15, 50,
    feature_dau < 50, 70,
    85
  )
| EVAL engagement_score = CASE(
    feature_events < 100, 25,
    feature_events < 500, 55,
    feature_events < 2000, 75,
    90
  )
| EVAL health_score = (usage_trend_score * 0.6) + (engagement_score * 0.4)
| EVAL churn_risk_probability = CASE(
    health_score < 40, 0.85,
    health_score < 55, 0.65,
    health_score < 70, 0.35,
    0.15
  )
| WHERE days_to_renewal <= 90 AND days_to_renewal > 0 AND churn_risk_probability >= 0.35
| EVAL potential_revenue_loss = tenants.contract_arr * churn_risk_probability
| SORT churn_risk_probability DESC, potential_revenue_loss DESC
| KEEP tenant_id, tenants.tenant_name, health_score, churn_risk_probability, days_to_renewal, tenants.contract_arr, potential_revenue_loss, tenants.customer_success_manager, feature_dau
| LIMIT 50
queries.description: Calculates customer health scores based on feature usage and engagement patterns, identifies at-risk accounts 60-90 days before renewal with churn probability, and quantifies potential revenue loss for prioritization

queries.name: API Partner Integration Health Monitoring
queries.pain_point: API Partner Ecosystem Health Monitoring - ensure third-party integrations operate reliably, maintain partner satisfaction, identify issues before they escalate to partner churn
queries.query:
FROM api_requests
| WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 7 days AND partner_id IS NOT NULL
| EVAL success = CASE(http_status >= 200 AND http_status < 300, 1, 0)
| EVAL hour_bucket = DATE_TRUNC(1 hour, @timestamp)
| STATS api_success_rate_pct = (SUM(success) / COUNT(*)) * 100, total_requests = COUNT(*) BY partner_id, hour_bucket
| CHANGE_POINT api_success_rate_pct BY hour_bucket
| STATS avg_success_rate = AVG(api_success_rate_pct), min_success_rate = MIN(api_success_rate_pct), degradation_events = SUM(CASE(change_point_detected == true AND api_success_rate_pct < 95, 1, 0)), total_requests_7d = SUM(total_requests) BY partner_id
| LOOKUP JOIN api_partners ON partner_id
| EVAL health_status = CASE(
    avg_success_rate >= 99.5 AND degradation_events == 0, "healthy",
    avg_success_rate >= 98 AND degradation_events <= 2, "monitoring",
    avg_success_rate >= 95 AND degradation_events <= 5, "at_risk",
    "critical"
  )
| WHERE health_status IN ("at_risk", "critical") OR degradation_events > 0
| EVAL priority = CASE(
    api_partners.tier == "strategic" AND health_status == "critical", 1,
    api_partners.tier == "strategic" AND health_status == "at_risk", 2,
    health_status == "critical", 3,
    4
  )
| SORT priority ASC, avg_success_rate ASC
| KEEP partner_id, api_partners.partner_name, api_partners.tier, avg_success_rate, min_success_rate, degradation_events, health_status, total_requests_7d, priority
| LIMIT 30
queries.description: Monitors API partner integration health by tracking success rates over time, detecting degradation events using change point analysis, and prioritizing issues by partner tier and severity

queries.name: A/B Experiment Performance Analysis with Semantic Discovery
queries.pain_point: Slow feedback loops on product releases - 4-6 weeks to understand feature impact prevents rapid iteration
queries.query:
FROM feature_usage_events
| WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - 7 days AND experiment_variant IS NOT NULL
| STATS conversion_rate = (SUM(CASE(conversion_event == true, 1, 0)) / COUNT(*)) * 100, avg_interaction_ms = AVG(interaction_duration_ms), unique_users = COUNT_DISTINCT(user_id), total_interactions = COUNT(*) BY experiment_variant
| LOOKUP JOIN ab_experiments ON experiment_variant=variant_id
| WHERE SEMANTIC(ab_experiments.experiment_hypothesis, "improve conversion rate checkout flow user engagement")
| EVAL uplift_pct = ((conversion_rate - ab_experiments.control_baseline) / ab_experiments.control_baseline) * 100
| EVAL statistical_significance = CASE(
    unique_users >= 1000 AND ABS(uplift_pct) >= 5, "significant",
    unique_users >= 500 AND ABS(uplift_pct) >= 10, "significant",
    unique_users >= 100, "insufficient_sample",
    "too_early"
  )
| EVAL decision = CASE(
    statistical_significance == "significant" AND uplift_pct > 5, "ship_variant",
    statistical_significance == "significant" AND uplift_pct < -5, "kill_variant",
    statistical_significance == "insufficient_sample", "continue_test",
    "wait_for_data"
  )
| EVAL engagement_improvement_pct = ((avg_interaction_ms - 5000) / 5000) * 100
| SORT uplift_pct DESC
| KEEP experiment_variant, ab_experiments.experiment_name, ab_experiments.variant_name, conversion_rate, ab_experiments.control_baseline, uplift_pct, unique_users, statistical_significance, decision, engagement_improvement_pct
| LIMIT 20
queries.description: Analyzes A/B experiment performance by calculating conversion rates and uplift vs control baseline, uses semantic search to find experiments related to conversion optimization, and provides go/no-go decisions based on statistical significance within 7 days

queries.name: Real-Time Feature Adoption Funnel Analysis with Parameterization
queries.pain_point: Real-Time Feature Adoption Analysis & Funnel Optimization - track granular feature usage patterns and workflow conversion rates, reducing feedback loops from 4-6 weeks to 3-7 days
queries.query:
FROM feature_usage_events
| WHERE @timestamp > NOW() - ?time_window AND feature_name == ?target_feature
| LOOKUP JOIN tenants ON tenant_id
| FORK
  (
    STATS total_users = COUNT_DISTINCT(user_id), total_interactions = COUNT(*) BY tenants.account_tier
    | EVAL metric_type = "adoption_by_tier"
  )
  (
    STATS dau = COUNT_DISTINCT(CASE(DATE_DIFF("day", @timestamp, NOW()) == 0, user_id, null)), mau = COUNT_DISTINCT(user_id)
    | EVAL stickiness = (dau / mau) * 100
    | EVAL metric_type = "feature_stickiness"
  )
  (
    STATS funnel_step1 = COUNT_DISTINCT(user_id), funnel_step2 = COUNT_DISTINCT(CASE(conversion_event == true, user_id, null)) BY tenants.industry_vertical
    | EVAL conversion_rate = (funnel_step2 / funnel_step1) * 100
    | EVAL metric_type = "funnel_conversion_by_industry"
    | SORT conversion_rate DESC
  )
queries.description: Provides multi-dimensional feature adoption analysis using FORK to simultaneously calculate: adoption rates by account tier, feature stickiness (DAU/MAU ratio), and funnel conversion rates by industry vertical. Parameterized for flexible time windows and feature selection
